subcodes.title: Words to Dr. Getsinger, spoken on 1914-08-24
subcodes.first_line: Economy is the foundation of human prosperity. The spendthrift is always in trouble
subcodes.subjects: @acquiescence and resignation; contentment, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @composure; tranquillity; serenity, @begging; mendicancy; idleness and sloth, @work as worship, @wealth inequality and its moderation, @conduct in finance and business
